channel.title: tiktokminze TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from tiktokminze

item.title: A short summary of the event. What did you like best? Let me know in the comments 🙏🏻🤝🏻 #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #PUBGM420 #PUBGMPrimewoodGenesis
item.description: A short summary of the event. What did you like best? Let me know in the comments 🙏🏻🤝🏻 #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #PUBGM420 #PUBGMPrimewoodGenesis

item.title: PUBG MOBILE x SCHOTT Find the event under Deals > Hot Events join a group and receive the outfit #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #PUBGMxSchott
item.description: PUBG MOBILE x SCHOTT Find the event under Deals > Hot Events join a group and receive the outfit #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #PUBGMxSchott

item.title: The Primewood Genesis theme song "Whisper" is here 🔥 You can listen to it anywhere and use it as lobby music 🥳 #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #PUBGM420 #PUBGMWhisper
item.description: The Primewood Genesis theme song "Whisper" is here 🔥 You can listen to it anywhere and use it as lobby music 🥳 #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #PUBGM420 #PUBGMWhisper

item.title: Discover the new team training ground! You can invite players to the training ground while they do some drills or just dance 😀 Have fun and good luck! 🥳 Thank you to @GṠॐDevilॐ #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #TrainingGround
item.description: Discover the new team training ground! You can invite players to the training ground while they do some drills or just dance 😀 Have fun and good luck! 🥳 Thank you to @GṠॐDevilॐ #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #TrainingGround

item.title: Hello friends! Announcement!! UC Rooms will be held Monday through Thursday! Live every evening at 6 PM Leave a follow and a huge thank you to @BORIS ❤️ #tiktokminze #21boris #ucrooms #pubgmobile
item.description: Hello friends! Announcement!! UC Rooms will be held Monday through Thursday! Live every evening at 6 PM Leave a follow and a huge thank you to @BORIS ❤️ #tiktokminze #21boris #ucrooms #pubgmobile

item.title: Hello friends! This video features a giveaway in the comments, in collaboration with 21boris. Drop your player ID in the comments and tag two friends. Follow me and Boris (the tagged people should also follow you) and join in! Good luck! Each lucky winner
item.description: Hello friends! This video features a giveaway in the comments, in collaboration with 21boris. Drop your player ID in the comments and tag two friends. Follow me and Boris (the tagged people should also follow you) and join in! Good luck! Each lucky winner

item.title: PUBG Mobile will receive a redesign in version 4.3. Take a look at this layout and try to understand how it works A cleaner, more focused layout. - New gray color scheme inspired by E-Ink. #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #PUBGMNewUI #PUBGM430BETA
item.description: PUBG Mobile will receive a redesign in version 4.3. Take a look at this layout and try to understand how it works A cleaner, more focused layout. - New gray color scheme inspired by E-Ink. #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #PUBGMNewUI #PUBGM430BETA

item.title: Since we now have the new ranking system... what's your level and what did you think of the promo matches? Let me know! 🙃 My tip is to find a suitable team and take it easy together. 🥳 I wish you all the best of luck and success! @BORIS thank you ! 💯 #PU
item.description: Since we now have the new ranking system... what's your level and what did you think of the promo matches? Let me know! 🙃 My tip is to find a suitable team and take it easy together. 🥳 I wish you all the best of luck and success! @BORIS thank you ! 💯 #PU

item.title: Skyhigh Spectacle is back 💯🔥🔥 Choose the event and enjoy the show #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #PUBGM420 #PUBGMSkyhighSpectacle

item.title: The new animal-themed advanced upgradable firearm Golden Pegasus - P90 for a limited time from 2/16 to 3/17! #PUBGMOBILE #pubgmnextstarprogram #PUBGMSETS420 #PUBGMSPIN420 #PUBGMSETS

item.title: Hello 🤝🏻 As promised, I've been thinking about it and can now report that we will be starting our first challenge on Friday, January 23, 2026, from 6 PM to 8:30 PM in my livestream. There will be a Team Deathmatch challenge during this time. Whoever beats
item.description: Hello 🤝🏻 As promised, I've been thinking about it and can now report that we will be starting our first challenge on Friday, January 23, 2026, from 6 PM to 8:30 PM in my livestream. There will be a Team Deathmatch challenge during this time. Whoever beats
